texts.biography: More than a hundred years have passed since Noctus found himself within the walls of the Spire Sanctuary, beginning his journey as a star-conjurer. Although he failed to attain the level of a soothsayer due to his uncontrolled mind, his journey as an oneiroguard has only just begun. Noctus, earning the name Night Mist, has become a formidable shield, protecting the realms of night from those who would seek to profit from its riches.
texts.name: Fog Noctus

specialty.description:
{Ice Bolt}

Casts Ice Bolt with increased effect, based on hero level compared to the level of the target unit (the bonus is greater when used on weaker units).
specialty.name: Ice Bolt
